title: armeria humilis
intro: Armeria humilis, also known as Alpine Marsh Thistle or Dwarf Thistle, is a low-growing, perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Armeria humilis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve immune function, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. Armeria humilis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties.
